introduction: Today, we'll examine the impact of our recent training program on the proficiency of our sales team. Specifically, we'll address how much the training has reduced time-to-proficiency for our representatives.

subsections.heading: Elexion's Sales Training Program Overview
subsections.content:
• The Sales Training Program was initiated in Q2 of 2023
• It includes in-depth modules on Elexion's electric vehicle technology and cross-border compliance regulations
• The program was developed in collaboration with our Product and Legal teams
• The training incorporates a blend of in-person and online learning methodologies
• It also focuses on improving customer interaction skills and product presentation techniques
• Post-training, sales representatives are required to complete a comprehensive assessment
• The program is updated quarterly to include the latest product developments and market trends
subsections.justification: This slide provides general information about the sales training program, but does not indicate how it reduced time-to-proficiency.

subsections.heading: Change in Time-to-Proficiency Post Training
subsections.content:
• The sales training program has seen a significant increase in the percentage of employees passing the post-training assessment in the first attempt
• The average score on the post-training assessment has increased by 15%
• The percentage of sales representatives achieving their quarterly targets on time has risen
• There has been a decrease in the number of customer complaints regarding product knowledge
• Sales representatives' understanding of cross-border compliance regulations has improved
• The rate of return customers has increased since the implementation of the sales training program
subsections.justification: This slide discusses various improvements post-training but does not mention how much the time-to-proficiency was reduced.

subsections.heading: Implications on Sales Performance and Revenue
subsections.content:
• Elexion's market share in the electric vehicle sector has grown by 7% since the introduction of the training program
• There has been a 12% increase in the average sales per representative
• Customer satisfaction ratings have increased by 18%, leading to an increase in repeat business
• The attrition rate among sales representatives has decreased
• There has been a significant increase in the number of cross-border sales
• Elexion's overall revenue has seen a steady growth trend since the implementation of the sales training program
subsections.justification: While this slide discusses the impact on sales and revenue, it does not provide the specific information about reduction in time-to-proficiency.

conclusion: Our new training program has significantly reduced the time-to-proficiency for our sales team, translating into improved sales performance. Moving forward, we must leverage this success and continue enhancing our training programs to foster even higher levels of proficiency.

image_queries.slide_title: Implications on Sales Performance and Revenue
